subject: Fw: JE
body:
G

PS My e mail has changed to gmax1@ellmax.com - plse make a note

----- Original Message -----
From: Peter Thomas Roth <peter@peterthomasroth.com>
To: Gmax
Sent: Fri Oct 12 09:07:24 2007
Subject: JE

Ghislaine-Please tell Jeffery how very sorry Noreen and I are for him and how terrible we feel for him. We totally feel he was set up to be made an example of...how very sad for him and for all of us. Please also let him know we know he did nothing wrong and will always love him and be our friend for ever. If he ever needs anything from us, or if he needs us to do anything for him, please get in touch with us and we will ALWAYS be there for him. Anything! Promise.....XXOO Peter
